title: スーパークリーク登場！

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, huff, puff... Almost... at the... finish line...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Trainer is waiting for me there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a variety of relationships that can exist
between an Umamusume and a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Hey! What's with this time?! I know you can do
better than that!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Right! Sorry!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, these aren't exactly the results we were
aiming for. What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Um, I thought that might be the case as I was
running...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We, on the other hand...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Finish!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, a new record! My time's slightly better than
before! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! You're the reason why any of this is
possible.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Who's a good trainer?! You are! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is how we've always been. Not a hint of
strictness.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Pat, pat. What a good trainer you are! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, right! Sorry, it just feels so nice patting you.
choice_data_list:
Is it okay for us to have this kind of
relationship?

Is it okay for us to have this kind of
relationship?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huh, what do you mean?
choice_data_list: We're way more laid-back than the others.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Laid-back? Hmm, I guess I see what you mean.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: But this is what works for us.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
There's one thing more important than anything
else when it comes to us running together.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Whether or not you feel the urge to coddle! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
As long as we both do, then we're peachy. That
applies to everyone to some extent.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek is a bundle of maternal instincts. She
was the one who actually chose me—that's how
our partnership began.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, I don't think we're anything like the
others, but I like to think that this is what makes
our bond unique.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's get our Twinkle Series started.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
There's a long road ahead of us, but I'm sure we'll
be okay.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'll be watching over you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We discuss our future goals.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, we'll need to start with the Classics, right?
The Satsuki Sho, the Derby, and the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's everyone's dream to be a Classics trainer,
after all. ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
At the very least, winning one would be great. All
of them, if possible.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I want you to have these victories, my precious
trainer.
choice_data_list: But you're the one running the races...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I want you to have all of the glory. So please, let
me help you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
If you're happy, I'm happy. ♪ Okay, let's roll our
sleeves up and get to work.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like something doesn't quite line up. Still,
thus marks the start of our Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's an Umamusume with a bright future ahead
of her, while I'm just a novice trainer. We're in
totally different leagues.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I need to focus on improving my own abilities if I
want any chance of leading her to success. Our
path to the top will be a long one.
